rows.label: tlk44310186_03_msg0001
rows.name:
The capital was built to last! Go
on! Get inside, where it's safe!

rows.label: tlk44310186_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Ah! Prince Sigurd and his retinue!
I didn't mean to offend.

rows.label: tlk44310186_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I'm telling travelers and suburbs folk
to get inside. That's my orders! The
city's strong enough to hold out.
